basic_details.job_title: MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 43 Graduate & Technician Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited (MIDHANI), Kanchan Bagh, Hyderabad – 500 058
basic_details.post_name: Graduate Apprentice Trainee (GAT) & Technician (Diploma) Apprentice Trainee (TAT)
basic_details.short_information: MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited (MIDHANI) recruitment notification 2026 for 43 Graduate & Technician (Diploma) Apprentice Trainee vacancies under MIDHANI, Hyderabad. The last date to apply and send the application through registered post/courier is 3rd June 2026 (5:00 PM). Find MIDHANI Apprentice vacancies on the official website midhani-india.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026” notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitm

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026. No TA/DA will be paid to candidates for attending selection/verification. No boarding or lodging expenses are admissible.

qualification.details: Candidates must be Engineering passouts from the years 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship under the Apprentices (Amendment) Act 1973, and/or having one year or more of experience, are not eligible to apply. Reservation guidelines under the Apprentices Act for EWS/OBC/SC/ST/PWD will be followed. Candidates claiming reservation must provide certificates in Government standard format; failing which their claim will be treated as General/UR category. OBC candidates must produce OBC certificate in Govt. prescribed format from the certificate issuing authority of Tahsildar. | Minimum Educational Qualification

selection_process: Selection of candidates will be based on merit against reservation categories. Merit will be decided on the basis of percentage of marks obtained in SSC (30%) and Graduation/Diploma in Engineering (70%). The final selection will be subject to verification of certificates (Age
how_to_apply: Candidates must first register at the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal at https://nats.education.gov.in. After successful NATS enrollment (allow at least one day for verification and approval), candidates must apply online to MIDHANI through the portal and also send the application form along with all supporting documents (NATS Enrollment Number, Age proof, Qualification certificates, Category certificate, and Aadhar) through registered post or courier to reach on or before 03-06-2026 (5:00 PM) at the address below. No TA/DA will be paid for attending selection. For NATS portal enrollment queries, contact [email protected] or [email protected]. For other clarifications, call 040-2418-4508.
Steps to Apply on NATS Portal (Already Enrolled Students):
Click Establishment Request Menu → Find Establishment
important_instructions: Only Engineering passouts of 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026 are eligible to apply. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing Apprenticeship under Apprentices (Amendment) Act 1973, or have one year or more experience, are not eligible. Candidates must register on NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) and also send physical application with supporting documents by registered post/courier. Candidates claiming EWS/OBC/SC/ST/PWD reservation must provide certificates in Government standard format; failing which claim will be treated as General/UR. OBC candidates must produce OBC certificate from the Tahsildar in Govt. prescribed OBC format. No TA/DA or boarding/lodging expenses will be paid for attending selection or document verification. Upon completion of Apprenticeship, MIDHANI has no obligation to offer employment; the apprentice cannot claim any right to employment on completion of training. MIDHANI reserves the right to restrict/increase the number of posts, alter eligibility criteria, and devise its own selection criteria. For portal enrollment queries, contact: [email protected] or [email protected]. For other clarifications, contact: 040-2418-4508.
